# /cam-premine

Use when the user provides a GitHub repo URL and asks whether it is worth CAM mining.

Prompt:

```text
Run `cam premine <github-url> --format markdown` or ask the operator to run it.
Summarize the verdict, score, risk gate, clone cost, allowed mining scope, and next step.
Do not clone unless the verdict is CLONE_NOW or the user approves a conditional clone.
```
